nameMeanings.name: Warnham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name, perhaps from Parnham in Beaminster (Dorset), which is recorded as Perham in 1228 and Parnham in 1431. The placename appears to derive from Old English peru ‘pear’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’. Alternatively, perhaps from a lost or unidentified place so named.

nameMeanings.name: Rafin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
